name: Cloudweb, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company Cloudweb, Inc. is a Florida corporation incorporated on May 25, 2014 as Formigli, Inc. In December 2015, the Company changed its name to Data Backup, Inc., and on November 4, 2016, the Company changed its name to Data Backup Solutions Inc. On October 1, 2017, the Company changed its name to Cloudweb, Inc. Our headquarters are located at 800 W El Camino Real Suite 180 Mountain View, Florida, CA 94040. We do not have a corporate website.
